title: polygala westii
intro: Polygala westii, also known as Yin Chiao or Chinese polygala, is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that belongs to the Polygalaceae family of plants. This plant is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which enable it to help the body adapt to stress and maintain balance in various physiological processes. The medicinal properties of Polygala westii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tablet, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits, including improved respiratory function and enhanced antioxidant activity.
